iti39:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti39:2.1: “Monks, the Tathāgata–worthy & rightly self-awakened–has two Dhamma discourses given in sequence.
iti39:2.4: This is the first Dhamma discourse.
iti39:2.5: ‘Having seen evil as evil, become disenchanted there, dispassionate there, released.’
iti39:2.6: This is the second Dhamma discourse.
iti39:2.7: These are the two Dhamma discourses that the Tathāgata–worthy & rightly self-awakened–has given in sequence.”
iti39:3.4:
awakened, sympathetic to all beings.
The first:
iti39:4.4: you will make an end of suffering & stress.
